value:
Hi Priya,

I'm sorry to hear you were charged twice this month — that's frustrating, especially after being a loyal customer for two years. I'd be happy to help get this resolved.

I can process a refund for the duplicate charge right away. To do so, I'll need a couple of details: the exact amount of the duplicate charge and the date it posted to your account (you mentioned the 3rd). Once I have those, I can submit the refund immediately.

Regarding next month's billing, duplicate charges like this are typically one-time system errors and shouldn't recur, but I'll flag your account so we can monitor it. You shouldn't need to update your payment method unless you've had other issues with it. If you'd prefer to update it anyway for peace of mind, you can do that anytime in your account settings.

Please reply with those charge details and I'll get the refund started for you today.

Thanks,
[Support Team]
